introSection: Generator is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Walibi Rhône-Alpes in Les Avenières, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. It is a Boomerang installation from Vekoma.

sections.title: History
sections.content: When the ride opened in 1988, it was called Boomerang. For the 2014 season, the ride was overhauled and renamed EqWalizer. The original Arrow Dynamics train was replaced with one built by Sunkid GmbH that has lap bars. For 2021, the ride was renamed Generator.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Aqua track and brown supports. The ride opened with yellow track and green supports, being repainted to feature pink track with yellow rails and purple supports in 2014. The repaint to its current colours was in 2021.

fullText:
Generator is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Walibi Rhône-Alpes in Les Avenières, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. It is a Boomerang installation from Vekoma.

When the ride opened in 1988, it was called Boomerang. For the 2014 season, the ride was overhauled and renamed EqWalizer. The original Arrow Dynamics train was replaced with one built by Sunkid GmbH that has lap bars. For 2021, the ride was renamed Generator.



Aqua track and brown supports. The ride opened with yellow track and green supports, being repainted to feature pink track with yellow rails and purple supports in 2014. The repaint to its current colours was in 2021.
